---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/alkistics
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/amaliavradi
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/amaliavr

---

About this blog
